feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: All Alphas Are Bastards (AAAB)
entry.summary:
Author: diecide

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,661Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 52

Summary: After Stiles gets kicked out of Kansas High School, the sheriff is forced to find a new job in Beacon Hills, California. What happens when the notorious troublemaker meets the beacon for monsters? Add in hot werewolves and family secrets, Stiles is positive the sheriff is going to disown him.

entry.title: Hero Management
entry.summary:
Author: ThoseSadisticTendencies

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,811Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 759

Summary: Stiles gets abducted by hunters one night and subsequently tortured to draw in the valuable members of the pack. However, matters quickly go south when they discover the connection between him and Derek. Angst and darkness with a semi-happy ending.AU in that Derek doesn’t get kidnapped by Kate Argent and they don’t go to Mexico but other semi-canon stuff may occur

entry.title: Yellow Paper Daisy
entry.summary:
Author: Babysterek

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 82,118Chapters: 24/25Kudos: 161

Summary: “Well,” Peter says at last, forcing a crooked smile into his voice, “at least this time he didn’t almost get us all killed.”Derek swallows. His throat is dry, the words scraping on the way out. “I was drunk.” They land and disappear without effect.Talia turns then, her gaze settling on him fully. It’s steady, unreadable, and it makes his shoulders tense despite himself. “You were careless,” she says. “You are a werewolf, and if you got drunk, you laced it with wolfsbane, you did it. Do you understand, In twenty-four years, every scandal has had the same root. You. At some point, it stops being bad luck and becomes character. And I am tired of pretending this is something that merely happens to you.”---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------Derek just wanted a moment of quiet. Instead, he crosses a line with the last person he should trust.....old grudges, bad decisions and a mistake he keeps repeating. "He learned the shape of the poison once,from a woman who wore it like skin.Now hemlock blooms in his own hands,and he cannot tell where she ends and he begins. "

entry.title: Where Ashes Lie
entry.summary:
Author: TendreChaos

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 212,893Chapters: 37/40Kudos: 204

Summary: Stiles has always known he was different, that there was something inside him people were afraid of.In a society where the supernatural is hunted and contained, sorcerers are stripped of their names, their freedom, and their humanity. After months of captivity behind concrete walls, Stiles manages to escape and disappears into the woods, where he finds a rebel group willing to take him in. But trust is fragile and Stiles carries a secret, a power he barely understands and cannot share.Because if they knew the truth, if they knew what Stiles really was... They wouldn’t hate the cage that once held him.They’d build a stronger one.

entry.summary:
Author: whumprec24

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,980Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 60

Summary: Months after the Nogitsune, Stiles is acting strange. A betrayal sets off a horrifying series of events which fracture the pack and which they may never recover from. The question is, what is wrong with Stiles? Is it just after effects of the Nogitsune's possession or is it the return of something more sinister?......

entry.title: Save Point
entry.summary:
Author: TheThirdChild

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,540Chapters: 11/14Kudos: 91

Summary: Stiles is determined to give Derek the perfect anniversary gift—the kind that proves he truly sees him. That somehow resulted in time travel and a surprise encounter with the Hale Pack pre-everything. Now he has to gather insight, avoid suspicion, and absolutely not rewrite history. Derek wanted something meaningful, but this might be too meaningful. Perfect gift status: pending.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,112Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 46

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of hope in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. He had quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up in Am Lit.

entry.title: Fated Connections
entry.summary:
Author: Zelena_Feya

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,723Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 85

Summary: Stiles has had enough of terrible dates. When his best friend Scott introduces him to Fated Connections, a matchmaking service for werewolves and humans, Stiles figures he has nothing to lose. He certainly isn't prepared to meet Derek Hale—a successful, intensely private werewolf who's been searching for a genuine partner.Their chemistry is immediate and undeniable, especially when Derek catches Stiles's scent and his entire demeanor shifts. One dinner date later, Stiles is falling hard, and Derek isn't letting him go anytime soon.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: in sickness and in health
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,922Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: When it looks like Derek can breathe a little easier than a moment ago, face no longer as screwed up in pain, Stiles speaks again. “Can I join you?” he asks softly.  Derek nods without opening his eyes.  Within a minute, Stiles is sliding behind him in the bathtub, having stripped out of his sleepclothes, one of Derek’s oversized Henleys and an old pair of plaid boxers. Now the smell of real-Stiles wraps around Derek like a weighted blanket. Everything feels right, feels okay again. If he can just keep his mind off his own body, off his stomach—

entry.title: The Beast That Wears the Man
entry.summary:
Author: asyndetonic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,388Chapters: 12/15Kudos: 45

Summary: To be or not to be… a werewolf in Ancient Rome. An epic romance inspired by Shakespeare’s Hamlet set in the early Roman Empire. Blood and swords and scandals and bathhouses and togas, oh my. Stiles is the heir to Rome making his mark on the frontier of the empire when he encounters Derek, a mysterious barbarian who offers a way to military victory. They face battle, revenge, and imperial plots, and the love and loyalty that grows between them alters the course of history. Updates Mondays & Fridays.

entry.summary:
Author: GDTiger

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,831Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 115

Summary: After the return of a monster they thought was long gone, Stiles and Lydia lost everyone in their pack. They are presented with one last chance, to save their pack and hopefully reunite what was once lost.   (alt. Stiles and Lydia going back in time only to forget their mission and instead just flirt with Derek and Laura) My version of a time travel fix -it :)

entry.title: My Name is Derek Hale [comic]
entry.summary:
Author: Melioristicbeast

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 0Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 1,182

Summary: From the original fic this comic is an adaptation of:“What day is it?” Derek demanded. “What?” “The day! What day is today?!” Derek let Stiles go, but only so he could reach into his pocket and pull out his phone. He tapped at the home screen, and then went so perfectly still that Stiles was pretty sure this guy wasn’t human. No human could stand that still. When it was clear Derek wasn’t going to move again without some prompting, Stiles said, “It’s Wednesday.” “That’s impossible,” Derek whispered. “Not really, it comes around every seven days.” “This is impossible,” Derek said again, looking around himself, as if he was searching for something.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Sparked: Part 1
entry.summary:
Author: HitopCub

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 366,325Chapters: 23/44Kudos: 51

Summary: “Your spark has always been there, waiting to be ignited. Now it’s your time to shine.” Stiles Stilinski left Beacon Hills with a leather-bound grimoire and a heart full of secrets—including the fact that in another reality, he’s already married to the man who gave it to him. Now, tucked away on the 13th floor of a Silicon Valley tech giant, Stiles is diving into six months of intensive training with a prestigious coven. He’s navigating a world where ancient magic meets cutting-edge tech, juggling unpredictable spark powers, and trying to keep his interdimensional past under wraps. But the 13th floor holds more than just spellbooks. Between a sinister presence sabotaging his training and whispers of a spy in the coven, Stiles is realizing that some secrets are more dangerous than his own. Master your magic. Don't spill the truth. And whatever you do, don't let Derek Hale see how much you remember.

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,433,820Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 64

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: A Fragile Thing
entry.summary:
Author: OyasumiPunPun

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,848Chapters: 5/10Kudos: 36

Summary: Derek Hale wanders into a forgotten corner of the city one rainy night, drawn by the pull of cyber-jazz from a hidden stairwell. Inside an underground gallery, one painting stops him cold—and then the artist does.Stiles Stilinski, with amber eyes, turpentine-stained hands, and an unsettling way of seeing right through people, offers something Derek has never allowed himself to want.One encounter. One fragile thing.And the carefully constructed life he’s trapped in—marriage, family, name—begins to crack.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Rise and Fall (Of Poromiel)
entry.summary:
Author: Fiction_Is_Freedom

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 866Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: The sun is rising again when I’ve finally scaled the highest peak with the deepest ridge possible, in hopes of giving the best of the Gryphons an extra second or two to choose me. I am not sure what I should say, or if I should speak at all. Certainly there is a level of arrogance and audacity here that no other Unbonded have attempted. We are taught not to do exactly what I have spent the past day doing. But I have made my choice and Bond or die, I don’t regret it.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
